emails.subject: GISB Contract
emails.body: GISB Contract Debra, Please prepare a GISB contract between Enron North America Corp. and Lost Creek Gathering Company, L.L.C. Lost Creek's address is Lost Creek Gathering Company, L.L.C. c/o ECT Wind River, L.L.C. 1200 17th Street, Suite 2750 Denver, Colorado 80202 Let me know if you need any further information. Call with any questions. Thanks. Shonnie
